description_long: This is a brown leather briefcase with a rectangular shape and a structured body, featuring a large main compartment and a front-facing flap secured by a metallic clasp. The briefcase is open, revealing a variety of office supplies inside, including a notepad, a pen, a calculator, a folder, and several sheets of paper. A wide, dark blue adjustable shoulder strap is attached to the sides, allowing for easy carrying. The interior is organized with dividers and pockets to keep items separated and accessible. The exterior has a smooth, matte finish with visible stitching along the edges, and the front flap includes a small metallic nameplate. There are no visible brand logos or external pockets, and the corners are not reinforced.
description: A brown leather briefcase with a blue shoulder strap, open to reveal organized office supplies and a metallic clasp on the front flap. The exterior is smooth and matte, with no visible logos or external pockets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open briefcase with visible office supplies, the metallic clasp, and the main compartment layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the briefcase, the attached shoulder strap, and the profile of the open flap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain brown back, the attachment points of the shoulder strap, and the absence of external pockets.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile of the open briefcase, the strap, and the edge of the notepad.
attribute_handle_type: One wide, flexible, dark blue fabric shoulder strap attached to the sides with metal loops; the strap is adjustable and non-retractable.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Single metallic clasp lock located at the center of the front flap; standard push-to-close and pull-to-open mechanism.
